name: Proxy Local AI Subscriptions
summary: Expose a local Codex or Claude Code subscription as a secured OpenAI-compatible endpoint, then optionally connect it to NextClaw.

summaryI18n.en: Expose a local Codex or Claude Code subscription as a secured OpenAI-compatible endpoint, then optionally connect it to NextClaw.
summaryI18n.zh: 把本机 Codex 或 Claude Code 订阅安全地代理成 OpenAI 兼容端点，并可在验证后接入 NextClaw。

description: Install and configure an audited CLIProxyAPI localhost gateway, complete Codex or Claude Code OAuth without exposing tokens, discover models, require a real OpenAI Responses reply, and only then ask whether to create a tested NextClaw custom provider. The provider workflow tests candidate configuration before enabling it and rolls back failed first-time creation. This skill is strictly for the current user's local machine; it does not support public exposure, account sharing, resale, quota bypass, or multi-user pools. The macOS Homebrew path is the currently verified durable-service path.

descriptionI18n.en: Install and configure an audited CLIProxyAPI localhost gateway, complete Codex or Claude Code OAuth without exposing tokens, discover models, require a real OpenAI Responses reply, and only then ask whether to create a tested NextClaw custom provider. The provider workflow tests candidate configuration before enabling it and rolls back failed first-time creation. This skill is strictly for the current user's local machine; it does not support public exposure, account sharing, resale, quota bypass, or multi-user pools. The macOS Homebrew path is the currently verified durable-service path.
descriptionI18n.zh: 安装并配置经过审计的 CLIProxyAPI localhost 网关，在不暴露 token 的前提下完成 Codex 或 Claude Code OAuth，发现真实模型并强制通过 OpenAI Responses 回复；成功后才询问是否创建 NextClaw 自定义 provider。provider 会先测试候选配置再启用，首次创建失败会自动回滚。本 skill 仅供当前用户在本机使用，不支持公网暴露、账号共享、转售、绕过配额或多用户账号池；目前完成持久服务验收的是 macOS Homebrew 路径。

author: NextClaw
